notes: Regression guard for forced-alignment overlap on repeated adjacent tokens ('the the'). word_01.end_us=700_000 overlaps word_02.start_us=680_000; deleting word_02 must clamp seg1 end to word_02.start_us, not word_01.end_us. Leaky variant simulates pre-clamp bug (20 ms of 660 Hz word_02 onset leaks into the edit). word_00=440Hz 'A', word_01/word_02=660Hz 'the the', word_03=880Hz 'B'. Regenerate via _generate_overlap_01.py.
